# Tłumaczenia specjalistyczne Vadym Rekel

## About

This website presents specialist translation services by Vadym Rekel, focused on Ukrainian, Russian and English translation work for legal, official, court, police, prosecution, business and digital evidence contexts.

The website is intended for clients, law firms, public institutions and businesses that need written translation support involving documents, PDF files, court materials, official records, Ukrainian documents, Russian-language documents, English-language documents and cyber-related evidence.

## Core services

- Ukrainian translations
- Russian translations
- English translations
- Legal translations
- Court and procedural document translations
- Police and prosecution material translations
- Business and company document translations
- Translation of documents from Ukraine
- Translation of PDF files and extracted text
- Translation of digital evidence, screenshots, messages and cyber-related material

## Important pages

- / — main page
- /ukrainski — Ukrainian translations
- /rosyjski — Russian translations
- /angielski — English translations
- /tlumaczenia-prawnicze — legal translation
- /sprawy-karne — criminal case materials
- /sprawy-cywilne — civil case materials
- /pdf-na-tekst — PDF to text helper
- /blog — expert knowledge base
- /kontakt — contact page

## Expert topics

The blog and landing pages cover:

- certified and specialist translation practice
- documents from Ukraine
- court, police and prosecution materials
- legal terminology and procedural documents
- page calculation and 1125-character billing rules
- PDF extraction and document preparation
- screenshots, communicators, BLIK, crypto, phishing and digital evidence
- translation workflows for law firms, institutions and private clients

## Author

Vadym Rekel

## Language and jurisdiction

Primary language: Polish.
Relevant market and jurisdiction: Poland.
